title: Intel's PC business will be dictated by AI data center momentum: CFRA
summary: Intel (INTC) stock is surging by over 11% in Thursday's extended hours after smashing second quarter expectations, reporting adjusted earnings of $0.42 per share (vs. estimates of $0.21) and revenue of $16.1 billion (vs. estimates of $14.43 billion). CFRA Research senior vice president and equity analyst Angelo Zino dives into Intel's earnings release and what he can garner about the trajectory of the company's PC business.

title: AMD CEO Lisa Su delivers keynote with big AI update for tech investors
summary:
AMD CEO Dr. Lisa Su takes the stage at the Advancing AI 2026 conference to outline the company's vision for the future of AI, introducing new chips and platforms to drive data center growth.
